subject: xone: update driver.
author: Sorgelig
provenance_doc_ref: patch-provenance.md §3.5 — re-sourced class D; all MiSTer xone commits (4ddd8ec3d, 5a7965488, c708f2222, e2eb39e6f, 8270e78f4, d776ddb4e, d5beb5aa6) migrated from kernel tree to BR2_PACKAGE_XONE

impact.effect_if_absent: GIP authentication subsystem (auth/ and crypto/) would be missing from xone driver; newer firmware dongles and Xbox Series X|S controllers requiring authentication would fail to authenticate

license_provenance: SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-2.0-or-later per auth.c, crypto.c (Copyright 2023-2024 Severin von Wnuck-Lipinski <severinvonw@outlook.de>). Verified in package source via xone.mk license-header audit (all source files including auth.c, crypto.c checked at pin time 2026-07-13).
notes: CRITICAL: This is NOT a silent regression. The commit adds GIP auth v1 and v2 protocols to the xone driver via auth/auth.c (665 lines) and auth/crypto.c (290 lines), plus three new device drivers (madcatz_glam, madcatz_strat, pdp_jaguar). The kernel-tree copy of xone has been superseded by BR2_PACKAGE_XONE (dlundqvist/xone fork), which is pinned to commit f2aa9fe01103d7600553b505b298ff0bd47ff280. This pinned commit includes the auth subsystem — verified by xone.mk explicitly checking auth.c and crypto.c for GPL-2.0-or-later headers at package pin time (2026-07-13). The actively-maintained dlundqvist fork independently developed equivalent auth support to what Sorgelig added to the kernel tree on 2026-04-17; dlundqvist's fork is explicitly the successor per the original medusalix/xone README ('in maintenance mode'). Architectural change (P3.2, re-source class D): no kernel patch carried; feature provided entirely by BR2_PACKAGE_XONE. No compat patches needed for 6.18 either (see xone.mk notes). Zero device IDs are *added* in this commit (new drivers use kernel input event codes, not new hardcoded IDs); verify new hardware support via the added driver bindings if needed.
